positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, deep indigo and ethereal teal color palette, featuring glowing crystalline trees and floating bioluminescent spores. The main subject is a stylized, symmetrical cluster of geometric constellations forming a nebula arch over a tranquil, misty ground. Composition should utilize strong negative space and clean silhouettes for high contrast. Style: Mid-century modern graphic illustration merged with clean Art Nouveau linework. Lighting: Soft, directional glow emanating from the flora, creating depth without harsh shadows. Aspect ratio optimized for repeat pattern or central placement on apparel. Highly detailed, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, low contrast, blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, signature, fuzzy, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor quality, low detail
